title: Deeply nested control structures (5+ levels)
description: Five or more levels of nested if/for/foreach/while blocks within a single function, indicating high cyclomatic complexity.
explanation: Deep nesting makes code hard to follow, test, and modify. Each level multiplies the number of execution paths.
fix: Use early returns/continue (guard clauses), extract inner blocks into named methods, or use array_filter/array_map.
